subcodes.first_line: O My honoured beloved! I have indeed perused the contents of the letter... and as to the matter of dissolution with the man [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیبی المحترم قد اطلعت بمضمون الخطاب ... و اما الفسخ مع الرجل
subcodes.subjects: @the power of example, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @justice and wrath of God, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
